review_text: Location good near tram stop though not easy to negotiate the crossing / not the best as it’s a bit well used
Awesome caravan park very friendly and helpful staff
Lovely
Close to the tram line with easy access to Canberra. Toilets and showers are a bit dated but clean, plenty of sites in February. $40 / night powered, $35 without.
Summernats !
I had no problems there it was clean and tidy for the price I gave it 5 stars

This would be the worst showground I have stayed in sites are poorly maintained
Amenities are filthy you do not need soap you could scrape it of the walls very poor cleaning and condition

Great place to stay and close to the city with the Tram nearly at the door step. $40 per night for powered site.
Dump point, laundry ( no kitchen) and play ground. Ammenities were clean and tidy although a little tired, but excellent anyway.
Highly recommend!!

EPIC Caravan Park is great. The location is just a short drive or light train ride into the city. Good value for $40 per night - power and water.

Lots of events occurred during our stay - e.g. Farmers' Markets on Saturday morning.  McDonald's is within easy walking distance if you need a snack or easy meal.

The cleaning staff do a great job to keep the amenities very clean. Sights can be hit and miss as far as being level, having large mud puddles or trees planted in awkward spots; not insurmountable problems but a little annoying that staff don't rectify or at least consider according to size of van during the placement process.
Showers are a bit tacky, however, the water is piping hot.  A good park, there is a laundry AND outdoor drying area.

I would definitely recommend staying here. The amenities are clean, the sites are huge,  the staff are lovely and it's really nice and quite here. You can hop on the tram and go into the city too. Thumbs up from me 👍

Hard to find the location during night time, we have arrived at 10 pm hard to access the site no lights and it is dark. The after hours gate 9 is very difficult to locate. When you are going through old well station road it is on left side after crossing the Canberra caravan park. The map is confusing as well it took a lot of time for us to find our spot. The place is safe and secure during the night. Toilets and showers are well maintained. Calming and relaxing site. Child friendly and spacious with outdoor facilities.
Good for a quick overnight stop. Amenities need a major upgrade.
Powered site 40 pn 2 adults. Washing machine dryer 5 each
Had a good stay, very happy with the price and facilities
You need to adjust your algorithms,some of these places you want me to review I am just passing by,or haven't completed my stay.

Great central location to access Canberra. Great showers. Markets on Saturday also awesome.
Huge thanks to the lady (sorry we didn't get your name) at reception when we arrived for being so friendly and accommodating to our kids asking if she had a sticker or stamp for their passports. She went out of her way to come to our site and give the kids a memento for their journals. Thanks!!
Nice caravan park. Thank you for the hospitality

Arrived for our 2 night stay. Obviously aware it's exhibition grounds so there would most likely be an event on. We were given no maps or prior warnings and spent 45minutes looking for the office to check in. Rang 4 times, left messages with no reply. Staff around the ground had no idea and were little help. We have stayed 4 times before in the camp ground near Fyshwick with no issues whatsoever but thought this time we would give this one a go. Never again! Disorganised, poorly managed. Finally got to our site and had to tape our power cord into their socket as it was distorted. Couple in office before us booked a powered site and paid for it and on arrival were given non powered site. We have been on the road for 5.5 months and have never come across such a crappy park! My advice is book somewhere else.

Convenient to visit Canberra! Definitely book online. It is a busy place. The after-hours arrival process was easy, and the fellow on the phone was super helpful.
The facilities were clean, and the heaters in the bathrooms in the morning were a welcome relief from the cold outside.
Neat and tidy sites amenities are old but well maintained staff are very welcoming

Good to average amenities.
The landscape is a bit scarce, but it is winter.
Great place to stay.
Central to everything, quiet, all the facilities you need
Great place to stay. Across the road is the light rail and not too far out of tow.

Nice camping area, well laid and quiet when I stayed.

Bathroom is clean, the water is hot and water pressure is great. Showers aren't timed either.

Laundry is also available but I didn't use that.

The camp ground itself is just a short drive to the tram, park your car and get on the tram to get to the city.

Would stay again
Great place staff are friendly

Once you're here, the venue is OK - good value for money, for example. But, trying to find your way into the place is a nightmare, and whenever there's something on (like the farmers markets), some of the entrances are closed off as well. Oh, and ironically, literally every time we've needed to use the female toilets, they've been closed for cleaning...

Great spot to camp, it just desperately needs the ablution block renovated to justify the price per stay.
Lovely check in staff and access is good.
Lots of powered sites for tents or caravans to camp in Canberra. There is an amenities block with toilets, showers and laundry. Worth a visit.
Nice quiet spot to camp

Hard to find in the dark.
Could not access water on our first night so we had to move the following day.
No A/H phone number on website.
Grounds need to be mowed.
Office is not in park but on other side of EPIC. Fantastic value and location. Good amenities. Very clean..wouldn't stay anywhere else

We have always stayed here even with the new park opening. If you want all new mod cons, concrete, no tress and the feeling of sardines and your willing to pay for it then go to the new park opposite. If you want trees, grass, clean amenities, maybe a bit old, then stay here. Much nicer, keep up the good work. Thanks.

5/5 for excellent service. Karen was just super on the ball and pre amped everything we needed. It made our transit between the snow and Sydney super convenient. Note: we didn’t use any facilities both times as our caravan is suitable for off grid so all we needed was a piece of land. :)
